evidence: Paper uses Shapley values, not impurity-based importance: 'These importances generated via Shapley values...show kinase inhibition states to be overwhelmingly more important.' Shapley values are permutation-based and robust to impurity bias. Features include ~800 continuous inhibition states, ~20,000 gene expression values, and additional omics types, with acknowledged scale mismatch. Main conclusions center on predictive accuracy (R^2 0.7) and experimental validation, not feature ranking.
